case_title: LOU, EDDIE T. et al VS DO, HAO HUU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-17-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-22-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PLTF SHALL APPEAR WITH THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE VEHICLE ON 7/22/05 AT 10:00 AM. IF OWNER WAIVES PROPERTY DAMAGE CLAIM OR ASSIGNS TO PLTF, THEN PLTF'S TOTAL DAMAGE SHALL BE $1604.02. IF PLTF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOU, EDDIE T. LOU, ALBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DO, HAO HUU $1,604.02 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,656.02, MR ALBERT LOU IS ADDED AS A PLAINTIFF IN THIS MATTER. THE JUDGMENT WAS PREVIOUSLY DETERMINDED BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAN ALWEISS ON 6-17-05. PLAINTIFF- EDDIE T. LOU- WAS FOUND TO BE 15% AT FAULT AND DEFENDANT-HAO HUU DO- WAS FOUND TO BE 85% AT FAULT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,885.21 FILED BY LOU, EDDIE T. LOU, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT DO, HAO HUU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DO, HAO HUU
FAILS TO COMPLY W/ THE ABOVE, THEN PLTF SHALL RECOVER A TOTAL OF $515. PLTF IS FOUND 15% COMPA- RATIVELY AT FAULT & DEFT IS FOUND 85% AT FAULT.
